label: New: Automation builder
items: Automations now have a single, more powerful builder — combine any number of conditions with AND/OR and 'is / isn't' logic.
Trigger on sensor readings, time of day and day of week (including overnight windows and a different setup at weekends), when a task is due, or the weather forecast — in any combination.
Each automation shows a plain-English summary of exactly when it runs.
Your existing automations were upgraded automatically and keep working exactly as before.
